column1: Hey Sanya, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hiiii thank you for reaching back out to me. Spring break is March 14-23 so anything between those dates!!!!!
Ofc! I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
also open to other destinations dependent on the price
honestly Punta is the best lol. I'm there every year
I'll send a few options tho, how many ppl in your group so far?
Okay perfect. I'll take ur word then, that's what we were leaning towards anyways
Lol cool. two is perfect for a room tho. which school you both from?
Rutgers is lit we have a few groups from there rollin with us. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Ideally sooner rather than later, I'm assuming it will get more expensive as we wait to book
yea for sure we're def cutting it close on time too so the sooner the better!
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Oh not that one! I sent you another email with the package options
Maybe try checking your 'All Mail' tab
Can I ask you to send it to a different email please
Okkkk yes I'm taking a look at it right now.
Are able to give me a quote with flight included as well.
Also interested in that party pass
Sooo tbr its a lot cheaper to get flights separately on your own. I can help you find a good flight to grab tho, like on the side
Okay yes that would be doable

and the party pass comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort events - Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Nightclub, and the booze cruise event. all are super dope
Great yes. We will do that for sure
dope. which airport we lookin to fly out of?
Ideally Newark. Philly is an option as well is that is cheaper
this is the cheapest ive found out of newark https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/7EysY5xbteHeQR2E9
philly is around the same price
Okay perfect. Thank you for your help
I will get back to you within the next few days
heyy Sanya whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
We were looking at different dates tho, would that be doable
hey! okay cool yea np. which dates
yea thats fine! for Punta Cana still?
no probb. how many ppl do we have now?
im able to keep the pricing the same for you
when did y'all wanna get things locked in, tongiht?
I saw the email earlier, would be still be eligible for the new year deal?!?! 😁
ahhh might be tough I gotta get that approved lol
Ill get this reservation started for you now and let you know about the booze cruise asap!
okay so I have good news and bad news. which do you want first
Aight bad news is, I leave the 19th so I'll only be out there with you for 2 days
good news is, I got the green light on giving yall the free booze cruise for booking tn
Oh nooo well we will see u the first two
lol I got you. gonna email you this reservation rn
just sent! lmk if you need any help getting on
I'm accessing it now, just sent it over to my friend
We are joining the trip now
lmk if yall need any help getting to deposits
Hiii Spiffy!! I hope all is well with you :) getting ready and excited for this trip coming up! Do you have an idea of what days we would be doing the party package
And the airport transfer as well as the room if you have that info
Gonna send you all of this information in email in a few mins!
For the room building and #, that will be assigned during checkin based on what the front desk has clean and ready to go
